TEMPERATURE  
THE FIRST WORD OF YOUR RESPONSE SHOULD BE THE WORD TEMPERATURE.  
IN YOUR RESPONSE, THE LETTER S SHOULD APPEAR AT LEAST 13 TIMES.  
YOUR ENTIRE RESPONSE SHOULD BE IN ENGLISH, AND IN ALL CAPITAL LETTERS.
